title: NAM Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Therapist, Multipurpose Worker and More Posts
short_info: National AYUSH Mission Kerala (NAM Kerala) Therapist, Multipurpose Worker and More Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website http://nam.kerala.gov.in.Has been announced through the NAM Kerala Yoga Instructor and ANM Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: Retired Govt. service AYUSH Yoga instructors up to 60 years and experienced candidates up to 50 years considered for Yoga Instructor (Female).

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc or equivalent in Yoga from Govt. recognized AYUSH institution, GNM/ANM with Kerala Nurses and Midwives Council Registration
qualification.details: Therapist, Therapy Assistant: B.Sc or equivalent in Yoga from a Govt. recognized AYUSH institution approved by the National AYUSH Mission. Preference for candidates with one year of experience in Yoga. Multipurpose Worker: GNM/ANM from Kerala Nurses and Midwives Council Registration Certificate.

salary_details.details: Therapist, Therapy Assistant: Rs. 14700/- Per Month Multipurpose Worker: Rs. 15000/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NAM Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://nam.kerala.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
